name: Dr. Digit's Southern Coleslaw for BBQ
recipeInstructions:
This is a different slaw from the usual mayonnaise version and is very close to the BBQ slaw you would find around Lexington, NC. By itself it is not so complex, but on a hot dog, on tomato slices, or as an accompaniment to BBQ, it can't be beat. The original recipe had 1/4 cup of sugar - we cut it down a bit, but not too much. That's what balances the spicy BBQ.
Use a food processor if you wish. Chop slaw. Mix rest of ingredients and whisk or blend until dissolved. Add to cabbage, mix well. Cover and refrigerate until cold.
